hideui.desc: Hide user interface elements for personal preference or to increase security.

options.badges: the OS badges (icons) in the menu

options.banner: the rEFInd title banner (built-in or loaded via "banner")

options.label: boot option text label in the menu

options.singleuser: remove the submenu options to boot Mac OS X in single-user or verbose modes; affects ONLY MacOS X

options.safemode: remove the submenu option to boot Mac OS X in "safe mode"

options.hwtest: the submenu option to run Apple's hardware test

options.arrows: scroll arrows on the OS selection tag line

options.hints: brief command summary in the menu

options.editor: the options editor (+, F2, or Insert on boot options menu)

scanfor.desc: Specify which types of operating systems rEFInd should scan for. This option can be used to speed up the boot process by skipping certain OS types.

options.osx: Scan for Mac OS X installations

options.manual: Do not scan for any OS; only show manually specified entries

options.external: Scan for OSes on external drives

options.internal: Scan for OSes on internal drives

dont_scan_volumes.desc: Specify volumes that rEFInd should not scan for operating systems. This can be used to exclude certain drives or partitions from the boot menu.

options.volume_name: The name of the volume to exclude from scanning

dont_scan_dirs.desc: Specify directories that rEFInd should not scan for operating systems. This can be used to exclude certain directories from the boot menu.

options.directory_path: The path of the directory to exclude from scanning

scan_delay.desc: Specify a delay (in seconds) before rEFInd scans for operating systems. This can be used to allow time for external drives to become ready.

timeout.desc: Specify the timeout (in seconds) before rEFInd automatically boots the default OS. A value of 0 means no timeout.

default_selection.desc: Specify the default boot option to select when the timeout expires. This can be an OS name, a volume label, or a specific boot entry.

showtools.desc: Specify which tools to show in the rEFInd menu. This can be used to provide quick access to utilities.
